ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-14-2004 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT JUDGMENT. THE FEB-20-2004 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

CAUSE CALLED, THE COURT ORDERED THAT PLAINTIFF MILL CREEK SERVICING CORPORATION,FORMERLY KNOWN AS CONSECO BANK, INC. ALSO KNOWN AS CONSECO FINANCIAL SERVICING CORPORATION HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DARIO, DARYL P POSSESSION OF THE FOLLOWING DESCRIBED PROPERTY, TO WIT: -SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGTH RE: PROPERTY ADDRESS; AND PROPERTY VALUE: $5,940.00., OR IN CASE A DELIVERY OF SAID PROPERTY TO PLAINTIFF CANNOT BE HAD, THEN THAT THE PLAINTIFF HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT $1,477.15, THE VALUE OF SAID PROPERTY, $14,692.75 DAMAGES, $1,800.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $184.75 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $16,677.50, $1477.15 IS THE INTEREST. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
